stemHtml: The pilot in command has the authority to enforce the law under the Tokyo Convention in cases of unlawful interference during flight. From what moment does the 'in-flight' time begin?

options.a: From the time at which the airplane gets pushed back from the gate.
options.b: From the time at which doors are closed at the gate.
options.c: From the time at which the throttle is advanced for take off.
options.d: From the time at which the airplane lifts off during take off.
